search.limitDesc: Daily intelligence synthesis limit reached. Scale your node to ELITE to unlock unlimited clinical search capacity.

searchPage.initSubtitle: Geben Sie oben ein Gesundheitsthema ein, um die klinische Synthese zu starten.
searchPage.noResultsDesc: Versuchen Sie, Ihre Suchanfrage oder Filter anzupassen.

discovery.title: Health Discovery
discovery.subtitle: Adaptive reasoning to guide your wellness path.
discovery.welcome: Hello! I'm the IKIKE Health Discovery Engine. How are you feeling today? Please describe any symptoms or discomfort you're experiencing.
discovery.disclaimer: Important: This is not a medical diagnosis. It is an educational discovery tool. Always seek professional advice for health concerns.
discovery.error: I encountered a synchronization error. Could you repeat that?

trends.title: Trends in der Gesundheitsforschung
trends.subtitle: Anonymisierte globale Suchdaten, die die am häufigsten diskutierten Gesundheitsthemen und pflanzlichen Heilmittel zeigen.
